title: Front Office Manager - Kerala Tourism - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Kerala Tourism - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Kerala Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kerala Tourism:
Kerala Tourism is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kerala Tourism!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
